1.title: Trump Says Musk Is ‘Off the Rails’ With America Party Effort
1.description: The tech billionaire’s effort to create a new political party, called the America Party, comes amid a ramped-up feud with the president over his new domestic policy law.
1.author: Tyler Pager

2.title: China and Russia Keep Their Distance From Iran During Crisis
2.description: Some U.S. officials talked about an “axis” of authoritarian nations, but the American and Israeli war with Iran has exposed the limits of that idea.
2.author: Edward Wong

3.title: Can Democrats Find Their Way on Immigration?
3.description: The party’s leftward shift in the Biden administration arguably laid the groundwork for President Trump’s aggressive approach. Deciding the next move won’t be easy.
3.author: Lisa Lerer, Jazmine Ulloa and Reid J. Epstein

4.title: How Democrats Lost on Immigration
4.description: There is agreement among Democrats that the party had a problem on immigration and border security in the 2024 election, but there’s no consensus on how to fix it. Lisa Lerer, a national political correspondent for The New York Times, describes how the party got here.
4.author: Lisa Lerer, Claire Hogan, Gabriel Blanco, Leila Medina, David Jouppi and Jon Hazell

5.title: North Carolina Braces For Medicaid Cuts Because of Trump’s Bill
5.description: President Trump’s domestic policy law jeopardizes plans to reopen one rural county’s hospital — and health coverage for hundreds of thousands of state residents.
5.author: Eduardo Medina

6.title: Elon Musk Says He Will Start the ‘America Party’ After Feuds With Trump
6.description: The tech billionaire, who has publicly feuded with President Trump, wrote on social media that he would be creating “the America Party,” though he hadn’t yet filed paperwork.
6.author: Theodore Schleifer

7.title: Iran’s supreme leader makes first public appearance since Iran-Israel war started - Politico
7.description: The 86-year-old cleric had spent the war in a bunker as threats to his life escalated.
7.author: Associated Press

8.title: Trump’s Tariff Date Arrives After a 90-Day Rollercoaster - Bloomberg
8.description: The world economy, beset with uncertainty for three months over Donald Trump’s on-again-off-again tariffs, is about to get more clarity as the US president’s deadline for trade deals arrives on Wednesday.
8.author: Brendan Murray, Craig Stirling

9.title: U.S. Turns Eight Migrants Over to South Sudan, Ending Weeks of Legal Limbo
9.description: Courts blocked the handover after lawyers raised concerns of torture. Then the Supreme Court intervened to allow the Trump administration’s plan to move forward.
9.author: Mattathias Schwartz and Hamed Aleaziz

10.title: Trump Says He Will Start Talks With China on TikTok Deal
10.description: President Trump has declined to enforce a statutory ban of the popular social media app while his administration negotiates a deal for an American company to acquire it.
10.author: Chris Cameron

11.title: The next megabill Congress needs to worry about - Politico
11.description: A sharp cliff for tax cuts and deep safety-net rollbacks will figure into the 2026 and 2028 elections.
11.author: Benjamin Guggenheim

12.title: Joseph Giordano, Surgeon Who Helped Save Reagan’s Life, Dies at 84
12.description: He had built one of the country’s leading trauma centers in Washington, which made it possible for his team to respond quickly after the president was shot.
12.author: Clay Risen

13.title: How to save thousands by stacking Trump's new-car tax credits with Biden's - USA Today
13.description: Presidents Donald Trump and Joe Biden both created car-buying incentives. Here's how to take advantage of both now.
13.author: Jim Sergent

14.title: The Interview: Mark Rutte, the Head of NATO, Thinks President Trump ‘Deserves All the Praise’
14.description: Mark Rutte has only good things to say about President Trump and his impact on the world stage.
14.author: Lulu Garcia-Navarro

15.title: Trump again floats the idea of letting farmers hire undocumented workers.
15.author: Alicia Chen

16.title: Vietnam Gains Edge With Early Trump Deal, US Group Head Says - Bloomberg
16.description: Vietnam’s race to secure a trade deal with the Trump administration, even if the details aren’t clear, gives the Southeast Asian country an advantage over regional rivals, according to Ted Osius, president of the US-Asean Business Council.
16.author: Francesca Stevens, Nguyen Dieu Tu Uyen

17.title: Court Rejects Effort to Keep Migrants From Being Sent to South Sudan
17.description: After the Supreme Court ruled that the deportations could move forward, a last-ditch attempt to block them with a new lawsuit faltered.
17.author: Mattathias Schwartz

18.title: Trump Signs Signature Policy Bill at Independence Day Event
18.description: President Trump triumphantly highlighted tax cuts in the legislation while downplaying cuts to Medicaid and other assistance for poor Americans.
18.author: Chris Cameron

19.title: Jewish Leaders Denounce Trump’s Use of Centuries-Old Trope
19.description: President Trump said he did not realize that the term “Shylock” was viewed as antisemitic.
19.author: Tyler Pager

20.title: Trump calls Zelensky after Russia hits Ukraine with a large air barrage.
20.description: It was the latest in a series of almost weekly large-scale missile and drone attacks. President Trump said he “didn’t make any progress” with President Vladimir V. Putin of Russia.
20.author: Andrew E. Kramer

21.title: How to Make the Biggest Splash, According to Science - WSJ
21.description: Cannonball, belly-flop or manu jumping? Physicists study the splashiest way to hit the water.
21.author: Nidhi Subbaraman
